title: Solve problems with bar graphs
description: Use bar graphs to solve addition and subtraction word problems.

assessment_items.question_content:
A graph of different starfish is shown below.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/7c187cbd91e8b011ba13e33322fe7cde604abb43)

**How many pink and yellow starfish are there all together?** 
 
[[☃ input-number 1]] starfish
hints:
There are $\maroonD7$ pink starfish.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/703e2b7f5e0d2f89bc5d8d909a28c7bb7a0c9aca)

There are $\goldE8$ yellow starfish.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a06808a4045f238b140953729cc0318049674e66)
$\maroonD{7} + \goldE8 = \blueE{15}$
There are $\blueE{15}$ pink and yellow starfish all together.

assessment_items.question_content:
A group of students graphed how many books they read during the month of June. 

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/82d4e180c485e3bcf4a1802bc4bf5b8ba9c7e5b5)

**How many books did Marian and Wendy read in total?**  

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] books
hints:
Marian read $\maroonD4$ books.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/51551e8c55ffa35c6d1a6293117b79ec63f4c9f4)

Wendy read $\goldE{9}$ books.  

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/97819dcd3d40272da170ec215f9938a14293a8d0)
$\maroonD{4} + \goldE{9} = \blueE{13}$
Marian and Wendy read $\blueE{13}$ books all together.

assessment_items.question_content:
A group of students graphed their favorite type of drink.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/32e7f689c88372d5b331e238645a0259e4d5865f)

**How many total students voted for milk or juice as their favorite type of drink?**  

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] students
hints:
$\maroonD{10}$ students chose milk.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b01e088f894f8c331fb596e4c8ca6055a74e3663)

$\goldE{9}$ students voted for juice.  

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/daf4c479f7a8f0d29f4e2b849e8b1bb8aa95dc8c)
$\maroonD{10} + \goldE{9} = \blueE{19}$
$\blueE{19}$ students voted for milk or juice as their favorite drink.

assessment_items.question_content:
The bar graph shows how many mermaids were in different locations.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/337c527e4fcefccd50dfdab60d44249feb3b298b)

**How many fewer mermaids are on the beach than on the island? **  

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] fewer mermaids
hints: $\text{Island} - \text{Beach} = \text{Difference in mermaids}$

The bar for Island lines up with $\purpleD{10}$ on the scale.  

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/5d6ec020e98c139db3db7c5a1f44b7a41f8b4028)

There were $\purpleD{10}$ mermaids on the island.

The bar for the Beach lines up with $\maroonD{4}$ on the scale.  

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a5ca437b98dc1c6a16bd3f3a6feef08020560e5b)

There were $\maroonD{4}$ mermaids on the beach.
$\purpleD{10} - \maroonD{4} = \blueE{6}$
There were $\blueE{6}$ fewer mermaids on the beach than on the island.

assessment_items.question_content:
A restaurant counted how many toppings go on their jumbo burger.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/446bbb16f8e7055364bf091124e0ac9324fffbd3)

**How many more pickles than onions are on the jumbo hamburger?**  

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] more pickles
hints: $\text{Pickles} - \text{Onions} = \text{Difference in toppings}$

There are $\maroonD{8}$ pickles on the hamburger.  

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/ca66f96876f52ea2dcdd41deea2782bd254e6ebe)

There are $\goldE{3}$ onions on the hamburger.  

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/45c76d9904fd463860f017f687a67353b5fc7809)
$\maroonD{8} - \goldE{3} = \blueE5$
There are $\blueE5$ more pickles than onions on the jumbo hamburger.

assessment_items.question_content:
A little pig is building a house. The pig graphed how many pieces of material she needs to build her house.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/7713607813b8dbce7c3d280498b3f60128c2e421)

**How many more bricks does she need than pieces of straw?  **  

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] more bricks
hints: $\text{Bricks} - \text{Straw} = \text{Difference in materials}$

The pig needs $\blueE7$ bricks.  

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/9dedc34182ae49675c26b8789cfff88603fde09d)

The pig needs $\goldE4$ pieces of straw.  

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a8338c2bb85510f583589f39415060e17e6b45af)
$\blueE{7} - \goldE4 = \blueE{3}$
The little pig needs $\blueE{3}$ more bricks than pieces of straw.

assessment_items.question_content:
Mr. Diemer asked the students in his class what their favorite ice cream flavor was and graphed the results. 

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/877373b40afeac278f2457908ad1e84bdc2744ff)

**How many total students are in Mr. Diemer's class?**

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] students
hints: To find the total number of students, let's start by finding the number of students that like each flavor.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a7e4fb6191af70fe456d073fb9ab5a4f3737dc9d)

Ice cream flavor | Number of students
- | - | -
Chocolate | ${12}$ students
Oreo | ${8}$ students
Mint | ${11}$ students
Vanilla | ${9}$ students

Now, let's add the number of students that like each flavor together.

${12} + {8} + {11} + {9} ={} ?$
There are $40$ students in Mr. Diemer's class.

assessment_items.question_content:
A group of friends graphed how many dollars they earned mowing grass.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/f996bb0709158d21c0e9927180bbbae8ffabfd93)

**How many dollars do the friends have all together?**   

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] dollars
hints: To find the total number of dollars, let's start by finding the number of dollars that each friend made.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/7d7d082929b2cca1119c5034d990334d8f265555)

Name | Dollars
- | - | -
Betsy | ${10}$ dollars
Bobby | ${7}$ dollars
Billy | ${5}$ dollars
Bella | ${12}$ dollars

Now, let's add the number of dollars each friend earned together.

${10} + {7} + {5} + {12} ={} ?$
All together, they earned $34$ dollars.

assessment_items.question_content:
A medieval fair graphed how many different actors they hired for each role.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/21e4b4da618d303cbe5f77e07c272fc85880f94e)

**How many total people did the fair hire?**  

[[☃ input-number 1]] people
hints: To find the total number of people, let's start by finding the number of people that were in each job.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/3ef35509f8efb52e1ef305792458d1af4233a99e)

Job | People
- | - | -
Princess | ${5}$ people
Ogre | ${2}$ people
Knight | ${11}$ people
Jester | ${9}$ people

Now, let's add the number of people in each job together.

${5} + {2} + {11} + {9} ={} ?$
The fair hired $27$ total people.

assessment_items.question_content:
James counted the number of alligators in various local bodies of water and graphed the results.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/9c79461fe1f42ec4a0d6e26f7db7fbca10823584)

**Which bodies of water had the same number of alligators?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
Two bars line up with $\blueE{12}$ on the scale.  

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/1c0290b4eefd6a69a3f3482b4667b23bf1cf9a6e)

There are $\blueE{12}$ alligators in each of those places.
Bite Swamp and Danger River had the same number of alligators.

assessment_items.question_content:
Davi the dragon keeper  measured how far each of his dragons can blow fire.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/77cdea8d934d86977c92bddbe6b401226e02900e)

**Which dragon blows fire farther than Sparky but not as far as Flame?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
The bar for Sparky lines up with $\purpleD{5}$ on the scale.  The bar for Flame lines up with $\redD{8}$ on the scale.  

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/29812da6ee326d6a3b10537f51a32ff42b4ca150)

Which dragon blows fire farther than $\purpleD{5\,\text{cm}}$ but less than $\redD{8\,\text{cm}}$?

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a72129a6d3deaaa51b5b3fcfd0d4527acb6dbd7f)

Wings blows fire $\greenE{7\,\text{cm}}$.
$\greenE{\text{Wings}}$ blows fire farther than Sparky but not as far as Flame.

assessment_items.question_content:
Some friends are blowing bubbles with chewing gum.  

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/4fe33df7a5d833a4696d92e1e49426ef32e50c1c)

**How many bubbles did Tristan make?**   

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] bubbles
hints: Let's start by finding out how many bubbles Tristan blew.

Tristan blows $\maroonD {11}$ bubbles.  

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e8d52a693c2508e76bc829522041312114018a05)
